title: pentameris involucrata
intro: Pentameris involucrata, also known as the clustered grass, is a type of perennial grass belonging to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, Pentameris involucrata has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this plant are said to include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Pentameris involucrata can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
